name: open_deep_research
readme_summary: Open Deep Research is an open-source agent application designed for deep research tasks. It offers high configurability, supporting various model providers, search tools, and MCP servers, and aims to match the performance of popular commercial deep research agents.
key_features: Performance on par with leading deep research agents
primary_use_case: To provide a flexible and open-source platform for conducting deep research tasks, allowing users to customize and integrate different AI models and search functionalities.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, old librarian meticulously sifting through an infinite library of glowing books and digital scrolls, each representing a piece of information. The librarian uses a magnifying glass that projects holographic data streams, organizing complex research findings into a clear, concise report. Subtle UI elements showing search queries and data analysis appear around the scene, with the repository name 'Open Deep Research' subtly etched on a nearby shelf. The overall mood is one of intellectual discovery and organized knowledge. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette and soft, ethereal lighting.

name: server
description: Sync-in server · Secure, open-source platform for file storage, sharing, collaboration, and syncing.
readme_summary: Sync-in Server is a self-hosted, open-source platform for secure file storage, sharing, and real-time collaboration. It provides users with full data ownership and control, integrating with modern authentication methods and offering advanced access controls for seamless teamwork.
key_features: Advanced User Access Control (Spaces & Shares, RBAC)
Document Management & File Protection (Storage quotas, file locking)
primary_use_case: To provide a self-hosted, secure, and collaborative platform for file storage, sharing, and document editing, ensuring data sovereignty and user control.
cover_image_prompt: A secure, modern vault door opening to reveal a vibrant, collaborative workspace filled with people working together on digital documents. Inside the vault, digital streams of files and data are neatly organized and protected, symbolizing secure storage and sovereignty. Subtle glowing lines connect the individuals and their documents, representing real-time collaboration and seamless syncing. Small, stylized icons of cloud storage and editing tools are subtly integrated into the background. The overall mood is one of secure productivity and interconnectedness. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, bright color palette and clear, defined elements.

name: memU
description: Memory for 24/7 proactive agents like OpenClaw.
readme_summary: memU is a Python memory framework designed for 24/7 proactive AI agents. It aims to significantly reduce LLM token costs by providing a structured, file-system-like memory that continuously captures and understands user intent, enabling agents to act proactively without constant explicit commands.
primary_use_case: To provide a persistent, structured, and cost-effective memory solution for always-on AI agents, enabling them to understand user intent and act proactively.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient librarian meticulously organizing an infinite, glowing library where books transform into digital data streams and then back into organized files. The librarian uses a holographic interface to cross-reference information, with glowing threads connecting different sections of the library, representing linked memories. Small, subtle UI elements showing file system navigation and data flow are visible on the interface. The overall mood is one of organized intelligence and continuous learning, set in a futuristic, serene environment with soft, ambient lighting. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a focus on the metaphor of structured, accessible knowledge.

name: Kiro
description: Kiro is an agentic IDE that works alongside you from prototype to production.
readme_summary: Kiro is an agentic IDE and CLI that streamlines software development from prototyping to production. It leverages AI for natural language coding assistance, spec-driven development, and automation of repetitive tasks through intelligent hooks and agent powers.
key_features: Agentic Chat for natural language coding assistance
Steering for custom rules and project context
MCP Servers for external tool integration
primary_use_case: To accelerate software development by providing an AI-powered IDE and CLI that understands codebase context, automates tasks, and facilitates spec-driven feature building.
cover_image_prompt: A master architect, embodying the Kiro IDE, standing at a holographic blueprint table. They are using a glowing stylus to sketch out complex building designs (representing software features) from simple spoken requests (represented by floating speech bubbles with natural language text). Around the architect, smaller, automated drones (representing hooks and agent powers) are efficiently assembling prefabricated components (representing code modules) based on the architect's plans. The scene is futuristic and clean, with subtle code snippets and data streams flowing around the core elements, visually linking the metaphor to software development. The overall style is a vibrant 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and intuitive representation of AI-assisted creation.

name: web-check
description: 🕵️‍♂️ All-in-one OSINT tool for analysing any website
readme_summary: Web-Check is a comprehensive OSINT tool written in TypeScript that analyzes websites to provide insights into their inner workings. It helps users understand, optimize, and secure their sites by uncovering potential attack vectors, analyzing server architecture, and identifying used technologies.
primary_use_case: Website analysis for security, optimization, and intelligence gathering.
cover_image_prompt: A digital detective, depicted as a wise owl with glowing cybernetic eyes, meticulously examining a complex, interconnected web of glowing data streams representing a website. The owl holds a magnifying glass that reveals hidden code snippets and security vulnerabilities within the streams, which are color-coded to indicate status (e.g., green for secure, red for vulnerable). In the background, subtle server racks and network diagrams are visible. Small UI elements showing DNS records and SSL certificates float around the owl. The overall mood is one of deep analysis and discovery, with a dark, tech-noir aesthetic and neon blue and purple highlights. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing detail and clarity.
